name: io.github.codeislaw101/katzilla
description: Unified data API for AI agents — 300+ free, public, and government data sources behind a single API key. Access economic, environmental, health, weather, financial, and government datasets with structured responses, quality metadata, and citations.

environmentVariables.description: Katzilla API key (get one free at https://katzilla.dev/dashboard)
environmentVariables.name: KATZILLA_API_KEY
